story.iWant: to materialize the runner, lane-worker, inspector, shipper, and telemetry facades through SEJ/resolver authority
story.soThat: the conveyor can move from declared architecture into executable, receipt-backed doorway surfaces

acceptanceCriteria: each character has a materialization SEJ
each generated facade is a thin resolver doorway

each generated facade has a conformance receipt
release remains blocked until all receipts pass
